MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation, is present. Represented by Hugo Sandoval.
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Luqman McCray, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-18-2010 is vacated.
